/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/lib/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/lib/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/lib/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/lib/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/lib/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/lib/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o my_app  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
